semantic.role: Core diagnostic utility for analyzing rule block retention and filtering in prompt relevance processing.
responsibilities: Extracts rule IDs from raw rule block text using regex pattern matching.
Builds diagnostics comparing raw and final rule data to identify retained and dropped rule blocks.
Integrates with dependency diagnostics to filter retained candidates based on context inclusion.
outOfScope: Handling HTTP requests or external API calls
invariants: Operates purely on string data representing rule blocks
Depends on local utility functions for rule block splitting
Exports a single diagnostic builder function

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide diagnostic insights into rule processing pipeline to ensure relevance and retention accuracy.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of broader refactoring to modularize CLI and decouple core infra services, though no direct changes evident in this snippet.

English.role: Core diagnostic utility for analyzing rule block retention and filtering in prompt relevance processing.

exports.name: buildDependencySelectionDiagnostics
exports.signature:
buildDependencySelectionDiagnostics(
  dependencyDiagnostics: ContextResolutionDiagnostics | undefined,
  finalContextData: string,
)
